raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main contribution as the SG-Constraint suite and tube-MPC, but does not clarify which is primary or rewrite both paragraphs to be consistent.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but the order of sections could be improved for better readability.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the scoring rubric), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (future work is mentioned, but not explicitly part of the active set).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no regressions are identified in the original).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main contribution as the SG-Constraint suite and tube-MPC, but does not clarify which is primary or rewrite both paragraphs to be consistent.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, but the order of sections could be improved for better readability.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the scoring rubric), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (future work is mentioned, but not explicitly part of the active set).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no regressions are identified in the original).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
